feature: Deep Gap Sprint 3 — Trading Parameter Sets
requirement: Unified TradingParameterSet entity bundling tick_table, circuit_breaker, allowed_order_types, auction_params per instrument

tasks.title: TradingParameterSet entity + store + handlers + engine wiring
tasks.description:
Create a unified trading parameter configuration per instrument.

APPEND to types.go:
- TradingParameterSet struct:
  ID string, InstrumentID string, Name string,
  TickTableID string (reference to existing TickTable),
  CircuitBreakerID string (reference to existing CircuitBreaker),
  AllowedOrderTypes []string (LIMIT/MARKET/STOP/STOP_LIMIT — configurable per instrument),
  AllowedTimeInForce []string (GTC/IOC/FOK/DAY — configurable),
  MinOrderSize int, MaxOrderSize int, MaxOrderValue float64,
  AuctionParams AuctionConfig,
  STPMode string,
  ShortSellingAllowed bool,
  CreatedAt, UpdatedAt — json tags

- AuctionConfig struct:
  RandomEndSeconds int (random end period for auctions),
  SurplusHandling string (PRO_RATA/TIME_PRIORITY),
  MinAuctionDuration int (seconds),
  CreatedAt — json tags

APPEND to store.go:
- TradingParamSetStore: Create, Get, GetByInstrument(instrumentID), List, Update, Delete + InMemory

Create handlers_trading_params.go:
- POST /api/v1/securities/trading-params — create parameter set for instrument
- GET /api/v1/securities/trading-params — list all
- GET /api/v1/securities/trading-params/{id} — get by ID
- GET /api/v1/securities/trading-params/instrument/{instrument_id} — get by instrument
- PUT /api/v1/securities/trading-params/{id} — update
- DELETE /api/v1/securities/trading-params/{id} — delete

Wire into order submission (handlers_order.go):
- Before processing order, load TradingParameterSet for the instrument
- If parameter set exists:
  - Validate order_type is in AllowedOrderTypes
  - Validate time_in_force is in AllowedTimeInForce
  - Validate quantity >= MinOrderSize and <= MaxOrderSize
  - Validate price * quantity <= MaxOrderValue (if set)
  - Use STPMode from param set (override instrument default)
  - Check ShortSellingAllowed before accepting SHORT_SELL

Update server.go + main.go + gateway routes.

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go build ./... && go test ./... && cd ../gateway && go build ./...

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T1.md

tasks.title: Unit tests for trading parameter sets
tasks.description:
Write tests.

1. store_test.go:
- TestTradingParamSetStore_Create_Get
- TestTradingParamSetStore_GetByInstrument
- TestTradingParamSetStore_Update
- TestTradingParamSetStore_Delete

2. handlers_trading_params_test.go:
- TestCreateTradingParamSet → 201
- TestGetByInstrument → 200
- TestUpdateTradingParamSet → 200
- TestOrderValidation_AllowedOrderType — MARKET allowed → pass
- TestOrderValidation_DisallowedOrderType — STOP not in allowed → 422
- TestOrderValidation_MinOrderSize — below min → 422
- TestOrderValidation_MaxOrderSize — above max → 422
- TestOrderValidation_MaxOrderValue — price*qty exceeds max → 422
- TestOrderValidation_ShortSellingDisabled — SHORT_SELL with ShortSellingAllowed=false → 422

Go at /usr/local/go/bin/go. cd src/securities-service && go test ./... -race -cover

Write handoff to .softhouse/handoff/T2.md
